settings.subtitle: For Every Run
settings.description:
Stride protects the foundation—feet, friction zones, anywhere skin meets repetitive motion. Sweet almond and jojoba oils create a breathable barrier that moves with you. Beeswax provides structure without stiffness. Shea butter conditions while calendula and lavender calm inflammation between efforts.

This is the formula you return to. The one in your kit for every run. Three to four hours of anti-chafe protection for the miles that build everything else.

Botanical Barrier Technology: Plant-based formulation combining emollient oils with natural wax structure for breathable, 3-4 hour friction protection.

Dermatologist Tested: Non-greasy, fast-absorbing formula safe for all skin types. Free from synthetic fragrances and petroleum derivatives.

Key Benefits:

  • Anti-chafe protection for 3-4 hours
  • Botanical inflammation control
  • Conditions skin between training sessions
  • Non-staining, absorbs clean
  • Natural lavender and calendula healing
settings.how_to_apply: Apply to clean, dry skin 15-20 minutes before running. Focus on high-friction areas: between toes, arch, heel, inner thighs, underarms, sports bra line, anywhere pack straps contact skin.
settings.ingredients_list: Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E), Calendula Officinalis Flower Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Oil, Mentha Pulegium (Pennyroyal) Leaf Oil
settings.shipping_info: Free shipping on orders over $50. Standard shipping: 3-5 business days.
settings.cross_sell_text: Racing over 4 hours? Discover Aura Ultra — engineered for 6-12+ hour protection.

settings.heading: Key Ingredients
settings.description: Each ingredient is selected for its proven ability to create a lasting moisture barrier while nourishing the skin through hours of repetitive movement.

settings.name: Coconut Oil
settings.description: Fast-absorbing emollient that creates a breathable moisture barrier.

settings.name: Beeswax
settings.description: Natural wax structure providing 3–4 hours of friction protection.

settings.name: Vitamin E
settings.description: Antioxidant shield protecting skin during repetitive motion.

settings.quote: I've tried every anti-chafe product on the market. Aura Stride is the only one that lasts my entire long run without reapplication.
settings.author: Sarah K.

settings.quote: Clean ingredients and it actually works. My go-to for daily training.
settings.author: Marcus R.
